title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Foxy, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I split a bamboo tree in half,

dialogue.text: Don't get hasty. What we seek...
